title: 36Pcs Silver 3D Butterfly Wall Stickers， Metallic Art Sticker ，Butterfly Wall Decals for Home Decor Butterflies Fridge Sticker Room Decoration Party Wedding Décor
features: 1.Package Included：36pcs hollow-out butterfly decals include 12pcs A style + 12pcs B style + 12pcs C style butterfly decals.

Style:Three styles in one color， Each style include 3 size. 4pcs 3''/8cm width;4pcs 4''/10cm width; 4pcs 5''/12cm width. Our 3D butterfly wall art stickers are durable, pressure resistance, easy to apply dry, clean and smooth surfaces.

3D Hollow-carved Design: This set of butterfly is designed with hollow and 3D effect, graceful lines and vivid molding, delicate detailed outline and comes with mirror material. The 3D effect design provides the butterflies with a rich three-dimensional effect. Under the light and shadow condition.
Material：Made from high quality double-sided metallic texture cardboard materials. Our product is no-toxic and environmental.
Easy to Use: These wall butterfly stickers are lightweight. Just use the attached glue dots to stick them to the wall or anywhere you need. Please use them on clear and smooth surface.
description: How to use？ Step1：Apply the double faced adhesive tape on the bottom of 3d butterflies sticker decals for walls. Step2：Fold the butterflies. Step3：Stick butterfly wall stickers on the place you want to decorate and push hard so that the butterfly wall decor won't fall down. Size: 4 pieces of 3''/8cm width, 4 pieces of 4''/10cm width,4 pieces of 5''/12cm width. As a beautiful gift: Nice gift for most special occasions like Christmas, wedding, birthday, anniversary, engagement, baby shower, graduation, retirement, etc.
